LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WORKERS' COMPENSATION APPEALS BOARD, RONNIE CAPLANE, JAMES CUENO, WILLIAM O'BRIEN, NEIL SULLIVAN, AND, DAVID HETTICK DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM OCT-20-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT NOV-20-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. HEARING HELD. MR. WEBB INFORMED THE COURT THE HE HAD A CHANGE OF ADDRESS AND DID NOT HAVE TIME TO RESPOND. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULES THAT THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO 11/20/09 FOR HEARING. OPPOSITION DUE AND SERVED BY 11/10/09, WITH COURTESY COPY TO THE COURT. THE COURT CLERK IS TO CONTACT MOVING PARTY AND ADVISE THEM OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600

Off Calendar Aug-12-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ARTHUR WEBB'S MOTION FOR GENUINESS OF DOCUMENT; FACTUAL FINDING; OPPOSITION TO SUSTAINING OF DEMURRER, AND JUDGMENT OF DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE, AND ORDER GRANTING VEXATIOS LITIGANT is off calendar. (1) No proof of service; (2) no legal basis for motion; and (3) judgment was entered against plaintiff on January 13, 2010. Defendants Workers' Compensation Appeals Board, Ronnie Caplane, James Cueno, William O'Brien, Neil Sullivan, And David Hettick Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants Workers' Compensation Appeals Board, Ronnie Caplane, James Cueno, William O'Brien, Neil Sullivan and David Hettick Demurrer to complaint. Appearances: Vincent Bausano, Esq. Counsel, Dept. of Industrial Relations, State of California (415) 703-5287 appearing for Defendant and moving party; Arthur Webb, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend. This Court has no jurisdiction over workers' compensation cases. Order signed in open Court. (302/HEK)Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797

Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Continued To Nov-20-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WORKERS' COMPENSATION APPEALS BOARD, RONNIE CAPLANE, JAMES CUENO, WILLIAM O'BRIEN, NEIL SULLIVAN, and, DAVID HETTICK DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Arthur Webb, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing; There are no other appearances. Hearing held. Mr. Webb informed the Court the he had a change of address and did not have time to respond. The Court vacates its tentative ruling and rules that the matter is continued to 11/20/09 for hearing. Opposition due and served by 11/10/09, with courtesy copy to the Court. The Court clerk is to contact moving party and advise them of the new hearing date. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600
